channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: After the update, Windows 11 has no sound and the audio isn't working
item.description: My Windows 11 laptop has no sound at all after a recent update. Speakers and headphones both dead. Volume is up, but nothing plays.
item.dc:creator: DashielQuinn

item.title: Windows 11 File Thumbnails Not Showing—Only Icons
item.description: All my pictures and videos show generic icons instead of thumbnails in Windows 11 File Explorer. I’ve checked settings—still broken.
item.dc:creator: ArkansasQuapaw

item.title: Windows 11 Why is my microphone so quiet in calls?
item.description: My built-in mic is really quiet on Windows 11 even at max volume. Friends say they can barely hear me. I tried settings but nothing helps.
item.dc:creator: Thatcherw

item.title: Windows 11 How to make windows snap to sides easier?
item.description: The snap layouts in Windows 11 sometimes don’t work when I drag windows. I want to quickly split screen like Windows 10. Any fix?
item.dc:creator: Wrentdr

item.title: Windows 11 Why do my games keep minimizing to desktop randomly?
item.description: When playing games fullscreen on Windows 11, they often jump back to desktop for no reason. No popups, no notifications—just random minimizing.
item.dc:creator: Kodyon

item.title: Windows 11 Laptop Fan Loud at 0% CPU Why?
item.description: My Windows 11 laptop fan is spinning full speed and loud, but CPU usage is 0–5%. No heavy apps just idle.
item.dc:creator: Castiellm

item.title: Windows 11 Screenshots Are Corrupted & Unreadable—Fix?
item.description: All my screenshots on Windows 11 come out pixelated, gray, or totally corrupted. I use Win+Shift+S and PrtScn—both broken. Tried updating drivers, no luck.
item.dc:creator: Komondor2240

item.title: Architecting Secure and Trustworthy AI Agents with Microsoft Foundry
item.description: Co-Authored by Avneesh Kaushik Why Trust Matters for AI Agents Unlike static ML models, AI agents call tools and APIs, retrieve enterprise data, generate dynamic outputs, and can act autonomously based on their planning. This introduces expanded risk surfaces: prompt injection, data exfiltration,...
item.dc:creator: PrabhKaur

item.title: How to uninstall riot client and stop it from running in windows?
item.description: On my Windows 10 PC, Riot Client keeps running in the background and won't let me uninstall it properly. Every time I try through Settings or Control Panel, I get an error saying the client is still running . Even after closing it from the system tray, some processes seem to linger.What's the...
item.dc:creator: BrianYoung

item.title: How to increase resolution of an image on Windows 11/10?
item.description: I have several low-resolution images that I need to make larger and clearer for a project. What's the best way to upscale images on Windows? I'm aware that simply resizing an image in Paint or Photos makes it blurry or pixelated. Are there any free or built-in Windows tools that can increase...
item.dc:creator: JesusGarcia

item.title: DLP Extends Its Ability to Control Copilot Processing
item.description: A new action for the DLP Policy for Copilot allows Microsoft 365 tenants to block Copilot from performing (Bing) web searches if a prompt contains sensitive information types. The new action allows Copilot to continue to process prompts using Microsoft 365 content (if the user has a Microsoft 365...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: What is the best mac cleaner software for disk cleanup?
item.description: My MacBook Pro is running low on storage and looking for reliable mac cleaner software to free up space. There are so many options out there and I'm not sure which one is actually the best for 2026. I prefer something that can safely purge old logs, cache files, language packs, and iOS backups...
item.dc:creator: PeterGreen

item.title: Announcing One‑Command Backup Configuration for AKS with Azure Backup
item.description: Running production workloads on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) is becoming the norm for platform teams building cloud‑native applications at scale. As these environments increasingly host stateful workloads using persistent volumes, ensuring data protection and rapid recovery becomes...
item.dc:creator: shobhitgarg

item.title: How to fix texturing issue on Windows PC?
item.description: I made a custom shape by using a boolean, and when I tried to add a texture to it the inside of the wedge, I found it overlaps with the main outside. I don't know how to fix this so they aren't overlapping.
item.dc:creator: Stonety

item.title: Windows Music Software for Game Development?
item.description: Hello everyone! As the title suggests, I would like to hear from all of you to know what music software you or your composer uses to make the music for your games.For a bit of background, I've been interested in game development ever since I was a young teenager and got my hands on a copy of RPG...
item.dc:creator: Jaxx-x

item.title: Wi-Fi has become unusuable on my PC
item.description: Hello, I have come across an issue where my Internet has become so slow on my PC to where nothing will load.For a bit of context, the other day the Internet on my PC was playing up a bit. It was having awful lag spikes at random intervals (upwards of 5k ping) for a good amount of time I was using...
item.dc:creator: Luxix

item.title: Managing Multi‑Tenant Azure Resource with SRE Agent and Lighthouse
item.description: Azure SRE Agent is an AI‑powered reliability assistant that helps teams diagnose and resolve production issues faster while reducing operational toil. It analyzes logs, metrics, alerts, and deployment data to perform root cause analysis and recommend or execute mitigations with human approval. It’s...
item.dc:creator: Pranab_Mandal

item.title: Using an AI Agent to Troubleshoot and Fix Azure Function App Issues
item.description: TOC Preparation Troubleshooting Workflow Conclusion Preparation Topic: Required tools AI agent: for example, Copilot CLI / OpenCode / Hermes / OpenClaw, etc. In this example, we use Copilot CLI. Model access: for example, Anthropic Claude Opus. Relevant skills: this example does not use skills, but...
item.dc:creator: theringe

item.title: Production Cutover in Cloud-Native Migrations
item.description: Migration Planning vs Runtime Reality Migration to container orchestration platforms such as Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) typically involves: Containerizing application workloads Configuring cluster networking Migrating data to managed storage services Updating application integrations Validating...
item.dc:creator: dhruti

item.title: Databricks Delta Sharing: Enabling Cost Efficient Cross Cloud Data Access
item.description: What Is Delta Sharing? Delta sharing is an open protocol for secure data sharing that allows organizations to share live data stored in Delta Lake with external consumers—across cloud providers such as Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud—while keeping the data in its original location. Consumers access...
item.dc:creator: kirankumar_manchiwar04

item.title: Dissecting LLM Container Cold-Start: Where the Time Actually Goes
item.description: Cold-start latency determines whether GPU clusters can scale to zero, how fast they can autoscale, and whether bursty or low-QPS workloads are economically viable. Most optimization effort targets the container pull path – faster registries, lazy-pull snapshotters, different compression formats....
item.dc:creator: robcronin

item.title: CodeQL 2.25.2 adds Kotlin 2.3.20 support and other updates
item.description: CodeQL is the static analysis engine behind GitHub code scanning, which finds and remediates security issues in your code. We’ve recently released CodeQL 2.25.2, which brings a new Kotlin version… The post CodeQL 2.25.2 adds Kotlin 2.3.20 support and other updates appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Enforce Cost Limits on KQL Queries and Notebooks in the Microsoft Sentinel Data Lake
item.description: Security teams face a constant tension: run the advanced analytics you need to stay ahead of threats, or hold back to keep costs predictable. Until now, Microsoft Sentinel let you set alerts to get notified when data lake usage approached a threshold — useful for awareness, but not enough to...
item.dc:creator: shubh_khandhadia

item.title: Message Trace Support Using Graph API is now in Public Preview
item.description: EDIT 2/6/2026: this feature is now GA (Generally Available) in our Multi Tenant (WW) environment. Full onboarding instructions are in the documentation. We are excited to announce that Message Trace support using Graph API is now GA. In response to feedback from our community, we are making...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Enable Copilot cloud agent via custom properties
item.description: You can now selectively enable GitHub Copilot cloud agent (CCA) access on a per-organization basis. Previously, enterprise admins and AI managers could only enable the agent everywhere, disable it everywhere,… The post Enable Copilot cloud agent via custom properties appeared first on The GitHub...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required
item.description: Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required Azure MCP tools are now built into Visual Studio 2022 as part of the Azure development workload — no separate extension to find, install, or update. You can enable over 230 tools across 45 Azure services directly in...
item.dc:creator: Yun Jung Choi

item.title: Data Security Posture Reports
item.description: Proving Your Data Security Posture with Confidence Microsoft Purview Posture Reports help organizations prove (not just assume) that their data security controls are working. They provide a clear, outcome‑based view of how effectively sensitivity labels and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies are...
item.dc:creator: Sarahzin_Shane

item.title: What’s new in Microsoft Entra – March 2026
item.description: From January through March 2026, Microsoft Entra introduced key updates to help organizations strengthen identity security, simplify governance, and improve user experience. This Q1 roundup highlights the latest feature releases and important changes—organized by product—so you can quickly see...
item.dc:creator: ShobhitSahay

item.title: From fragmented sites to consistent governance: Azure Arc patterns for adaptive cloud strategy.
item.description: In Manufacturing companies, hybrid architectures aren’t transitional—they’re persistent. Most large manufacturers operate across remote plants, branch sites, private datacenters, and Azure. The main challenge manufacturers face isn’t adopting cloud services, it is preventing long‑term operational...
item.dc:creator: sakshimalhotra

item.title: Data Security Posture Reports (Custom Workspace and Charts)
item.description: For more insights on OOB Reports, check out this article. Overview: NOW IN PUBLIC PREVIEW Microsoft Purview Posture Reports provide a clear, outcome‑based view of how effectively data protection controls, such as Sensitivity Labels and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies, are working across...
item.dc:creator: Sarahzin_Shane

item.title: M365 Security Basics: Keeping Your Data Safe Online
item.description: In today’s digital-first world, data is one of the most valuable assets a business or individual can have. Whether it’s emails, documents, spreadsheets, or sensitive customer information, protecting that data is critical. With Microsoft 365 (M365) being one of the most widely used productivity...
item.dc:creator: JohnNaguib

item.title: Build a personal organization command center with GitHub Copilot CLI
item.description: Learn about the productivity tool one GitHub engineer built, and how AI supported the development process. The post Build a personal organization command center with GitHub Copilot CLI appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Cassidy Williams

item.title: Pin Clustering in .NET MAUI Maps
item.description: .NET MAUI 11 adds pin clustering to the Map control, automatically grouping nearby pins into cluster markers. Learn how to enable clustering, create separate clustering groups, and handle cluster taps on Android and iOS. The post Pin Clustering in .NET MAUI Maps appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: David Ortinau

item.title: Gemma 4 on Azure Container Apps Serverless GPU
item.description: Every prompt you send to a hosted AI service leaves your tenant. Your code, your architecture decisions, your proprietary logic — all of it crosses a network boundary you don't control. For teams building in regulated industries or handling sensitive IP, that's not a philosophical concern. It's a...
item.dc:creator: simonjj

item.title: Incident response for AI: Same fire, different fuel
item.description: AI changes how incidents unfold and how we respond. Learn which IR practices still apply and where new telemetry, tools, and skills are needed. The post Incident response for AI: Same fire, different fuel appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Phillip Misner and Stephen Finnigan

item.title: Stop Hunting Bugs: Meet the New Visual Studio Debugger Agent Workflow
item.description: We’ve all been there: a bug report lands in your inbox with a title like “App crashes sometimes” and zero reproduction steps. Your morning, which was supposed to be spent building new features, is now a forensic investigation. You’re setting scattershot breakpoints, staring at the call stack, and...
item.dc:creator: Harshada Hole

item.title: Enabling fallback to internet for Azure Private DNS Zones in hybrid architectures
item.description: Introduction Azure Private Endpoint enables secure connectivity to Azure PaaS services such as: Azure SQL Managed Instance Azure Container Registry Azure Key Vault Azure Storage Account through private IP addresses within a virtual network. When Private Endpoint is enabled for a service, Azure DNS...
item.dc:creator: kirankumar_manchiwar04

item.title: One-click security scanning and org-wide alert triage come to Advanced Security
item.description: We’re shipping two major capabilities that change how security teams enable and act on application security in Azure DevOps: CodeQL default setup makes it possible to enable code scanning across your organization without configuring a single pipeline, and a new combined alerts experience in...
item.dc:creator: Laura Jiang

item.title: Developer policy update: Intermediary liability, copyright, and transparency
item.description: We’re sharing recent policy updates that developers should know about, updating our Transparency Center with the full year of 2025 data, and looking to what’s ahead. The post Developer policy update: Intermediary liability, copyright, and transparency appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Margaret Tucker

item.title: Announcing Period 2 Exchange 2016/2019 Extended Security Update (ESU) program
item.description: While both Exchange 2016 and 2019 are out of support since October 2025, some of our customers who needed more time to finalize migrations to Exchange Subscription Edition (SE) have opted to enroll into the Extended Security Update program. That ESU program started in October 2025 and is ending in...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Your Oracle Data Is Sitting Next to Microsoft AI. Are You Using It?
item.description: "Your organization runs Oracle on Azure. You've purchased Microsoft Foundry & OpenAI licenses. Why are your AI projects still stuck in proof-of-concept? "Your employees spend hours every week entering or reconciling data from documents, copying information into ERP systems. What would it mean if...
item.dc:creator: ManishChopra

item.title: Planner task comments no longer send email notifications – critical regression
item.description: This change removed a previously existing core functionality without providing an adequate replacement.With the new Planner experience, task comments no longer trigger automatic email notifications to assigned users. This breaks a critical communication mechanism that many teams relied on for...
item.dc:creator: JörgWR

item.title: Windows 11 Why do my Bluetooth headphones keep cutting out randomly?
item.description: My Bluetooth headphones work fine on my phone, but on Windows 11, the audio keeps cutting out every few minutes. I’ve tried updating drivers, but it still happens. Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: Stonehu

item.title: Windows 11 What is a virtual hard disk, and does it add real storage?
item.description: I saw the virtual hard disk option on my Windows 11 laptop. My device only has 512GB, but this lets me set a huge "storage" size. Can I use it to store files? Does it actually give me more space, and what's it for?
item.dc:creator: OakleyCruz

item.title: Windows 11 WiFi keeps disconnecting randomly
item.description: My WiFi works fine on other devices but on Windows 11 it disconnects out of nowhere every few minutes. I have to reconnect manually every time. Super annoying when working or watching videos.
item.dc:creator: Mikaeliop

item.title: Windows 11 right menu is too slow and laggy
item.description: Right clicking on files or desktop takes forever to show the menu. It’s way slower than Windows 10. Is there a way to make it faster or go back to the old right-click menu?
item.dc:creator: AAbner

item.title: A demonstration of Virtual Network TAP
item.description: Azure Virtual Network Terminal Access Point (VTAP), at the time of writing in April 2026 in public preview in select regions, copies network traffic from source Virtual Machines to a collector or traffic analytics tool, running as a Network Virtual Appliance (NVA). VTAP creates a full copy of all...
item.dc:creator: Marc de Droog

item.title: Creating a Planner Weekly Notification Email for Incomplete Tasks
item.description: A reader wanted a weekly incomplete task report to send details of Planner tasks to people with outstanding work to do. We used PowerShell to scan for incomplete tasks for people who are members of a group, perform some analysis on the data, and create and send email. Despite some deficiencies in...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: How to unlock iPhone when is disabled and connect to itunes?
item.description: My iPhone is disabled after several incorrect passcode attempts, and now it cannot be accessed at all. The screen shows a message:iPhone is disabled. Connect to iTunesNow, this iPhone is unavailable, and there doesn't seem to be a way to enter the passcode again. What is the safest and easiest way...
item.dc:creator: AndrewHall

item.title: Unable to control iphone from mac via iphone mirroring app
item.description: Hi everyone,A connection issue appears when trying to use the iPhone mirroring feature on a Mac. The device does not show up, or the connection fails without a clear message. Both devices seem to be on the same network, but the feature still does not work as expected.How can I control iphone from...
item.dc:creator: HunterBell
